Video.summary: Bob paints a cabin in snowy woods.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Snowy Morn

Video.summary: Clouds and sea roll in toward land.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Seascape Fantasy

Video.summary: Bob paints snowy peaks and water.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Summit

Video.summary: Bob uses color to create realistic waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Emerald Waters

Video.summary: Bob paints a brook in a colorful landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Meadow Brook

Video.summary: Bob paints a desert scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Southwest Serenity

Video.summary: Bob paints a forest on partially black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Enchanted Forest

Video.summary: Firs front rugged peaks.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Exhibition

Video.summary: Bob paints a tranquil lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Quiet Mountain Lake

Video.summary: Bob paints within a double oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Double Oval Stream

Video.summary: Branches bend over a misty stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Morning Mist

Video.summary: Bob paints a wintry mountain scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Frozen Solitude

Video.summary: Bob paints a restful scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Peaceful Haven

Video.summary: Bob demonstrates wet-on-wet technique.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain View

Video.summary: Bare trees darken an isolated creek.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hidden Creek

Video.summary: Bob paints a serene lake and distant hills.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Rolling Hills

Video.summary: The stillness of a cold darkness is captured as a cozy little cabin rests atop a snow covered hill.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Night

Video.summary: Bob paints a pleasant valley.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Camper's Haven

Video.summary: Bob paints a soft winter scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Lace

Video.summary: Bob paints a forest stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Rippling Waters

Video.summary: Fading light shrouds a lone cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Evening Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a silent snowy scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Snowfall Magic

Video.summary: Far, far away there rests a mountain nestled in misty clouds and foothills.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Distant Hills

Video.summary: A woodland scene lit by the waning rays of the sun.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Final Embers of Sunlight

Video.summary: Bob paints a waterfall.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Wilderness Falls

Video.summary: Bob paints a scene with sun and shadows.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Sunlight in the Shadows

Video.summary: In the midst of the forest flows a stream that splashes and trickles endlessly along.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bubbling Stream

Video.summary: The sounds of quiet waters, the sight of velvety green shrubs and the hint of distance foothills in a perfect scene of relaxation.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Quiet Inlet

Video.summary: Bob paints a lush island.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Island Paradise

Video.summary: Bob paints a snow scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Splendor of a Snowy Winter

Video.summary: Bob paints a beautiful summer getaway with rugged brown peaks, clear blue waters and a cozy little cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Retreat

Video.summary: Beautiful foliage and fierce skies with an almighty mountain overlooking a calm lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Final Grace

Video.summary: Bob paints flowers at sunrise.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Daisies at Dawn

Video.summary: Bob paints a bridge in a forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Covered Bridge

Video.summary: Breathtaking skies, bending palms and waves that accentuate the cool night breeze.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Blue Moon

Video.summary: Bob paints in warm hues.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Glow of Morning

Video.summary: Bob paints a breathtaking scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: A Spectacular View

Video.summary: Bob paints a river in the woods.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Forest River

Video.summary: Bob paints a sunrise scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Daybreak

Video.summary: Bob paints a farm in winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter at the Farm

Video.summary: A bubbling stream, a distant waterfall and tumultuous skies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black Waterfall

Video.summary: A wondrous plush green forest where an almost invisible mountain overlooks a falling stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Waterfall
